creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Rene Ladan from comment #12)
> ... the patch set is only available on our own mirror.
In 2008 Arch Linux folks had also noticed[1] that jade_1.2.1-45.diff.gz is no longer available on Debian's servers, and had switched to jade_1.2.1-47.diff.gz, which can now be found on Ubuntu's[2].  I'll see if the mirror list can be amended.

(In reply to Cy Schubert from comment #14)
> Probably be best if I return it to the pool. I have no need of it anymore.
We don't have to ping-pong maintainership and/or orphaning the port, I'll take it under my wing together with unbreaking it.

[1] https://bugs.archlinux.org/task/9495.html
[2] https://old-releases.ubuntu.com/ubuntu/pool/main/j/jade/
